case_title: LIPSCOMB DONNA DEE VS JENKINS TYRONE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LIPSCOMB DONNA DEE AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS TYRONE MISS SUMMERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
CORRESPONDENCE FROM VICKY JENKINS CENTER DIRECTOR FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIPSCOMB DONNA DEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JENKINS TYRONE MISS SUMMERS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
A NOTE TO SMALL CLAIMS ON FILE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS TYRONE
